headline: Prologis (PLD) Upgraded to Buy: Here's What You Should Know
summary: Prologis (PLD) might move higher on growing optimism about its earnings prospects, which is reflected by its upgrade to a Zacks Rank #2 (Buy).

headline: 3 Disconnects Between REIT Pricing And Property Value
summary: We found 3 high-quality, well-managed REITs that are priced as if their entity value is negative, despite strong operational metrics and investment-grade balance sheets. Read about them here
